CHEESER'S PALACE

This grade is calculated by us from Florida DBPR public inspection records — Florida does not issue official grades. How we calculate it →

Data last updated: April 22, 2026

A · 98/100 · safer than 92% of Lake County

It ranks safer than 92% of Lake County restaurants we grade. The last inspection (April 22, 2026) noted just 2 basic violations. Menus here flag options for vegan, vegetarian, and healthy diners.
